DescribeTasks.document: This example shows you how to query the list of tasks.
DescribeTasks.input:
POST / HTTP/1.1
Host: dlc.tencentcloudapi.com
Content-Type: application/json
X-TC-Action: DescribeTasks
<Common request parameters>

{
    "Limit": 1,
    "Offset": 0,
    "Filters": [
        {
            "Name": "task-type",
            "Values": [
                "GovernSparkSQLTask",
                "GovernSparkBatchTask",
                "StandardGovernSparkSQLTask"
            ]
        }
    ],
    "SortBy": "create-time ",
    "Sorting": "desc ",
    "StartTime": "2024-01-15 00:00:00",
    "EndTime": "2025-01-16 23:59:59",
    "DataEngineName": "",
    "ResourceGroupName": ""
}
